message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should go to norwich
The train should arrive by 20:30 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 1 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from thursday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
